name: Phase-scoped UX problems
description: UI / agent-workflow problems must map to specific phases, not be silently dumped into cross-cutting.

problems.text: The onboarding form has 14 required fields and most users drop off at field 8.
Service agents take 4 minutes per case to find renewal eligibility because it's buried under three tabs.
The post-purchase confirmation page never shows the delivery date, so customers immediately call support.

journeyPhases.label: Onboarding
journeyPhases.description: New customer is setting up their account and entering core profile data.

journeyPhases.label: Renewal
journeyPhases.description: Customer evaluates whether to renew the relationship.

journeyPhases.label: Post-Purchase
journeyPhases.description: Order is placed and customer awaits fulfilment.
